title: Federation Snapshot Payload (FDEP)
description: Immutable full-state snapshot used for cross-instance CIR synchronization. This schema is strictly a transport format and MUST NOT introduce identity authority, trust evaluation, or policy logic. All CIR objects MUST conform to the Asveora Unified Identity Model (AUIM).

snapshot_id.description: Unique identifier for this snapshot payload

source_instance.description: Origin Network Instance generating this snapshot

cir_records.description: Full CIR objects included in this snapshot. MUST strictly conform to AUIM CIR definition. No transformation, interpretation, or enrichment is permitted.

registry_context.description: Non-authoritative contextual metadata for synchronization observability only. MUST NOT influence identity state or trust evaluation.

last_commit_id.description: Reference to latest registry commit associated with this snapshot
